results.rendered_html:
upadiṣṭa p. p.
1 Specified, pointed out, particularized; pṛthūpadiṣṭāṃ duduhurdharitrīṃ  Ku. 1. 2. 
2 Taught instructed, advised.
3 Put forward as a plea or reason.
4 Initiated.
— ṣṭaṃ Advice.
